summary: Markets remain volatile amid US-Iran Hormuz tensions and anticipation of key US inflation data (CPI Wednesday, PPI Wednesday, Retail Sales Thursday); risk assets and commodities show mixed signals with crypto holding structural support while precious metals face headwinds from delayed rate-cut expectations.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin coiling before CPI with potential squeeze higher, ignoring bull traps and targeting $85K after liquidity trap.

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: SOL ready to rip as Bitcoin coils before CPI.

signals.reason: SUI ready to rip as Bitcoin coils before CPI.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: Price action dependent on broader risk sentiment; $2,361–2,367 MA cluster and $2,211 support define key boundaries with amplified volatility expected.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Core paradox: Hormuz crisis drives safe-haven demand but delays rate cuts via oil-driven inflation; soft CPI data would be bullish, hot data bearish.
signals.chart_pattern: Testing 40-period SMA on H1; early bullish MACD convergence on Daily

signals.name: Silver
signals.reason: Highly sensitive to CPI outcome and rate-cut expectations; Hormuz tensions provide temporary support but inflation concerns create headwinds.

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Hormuz crisis remains primary driver; analysts recommend long positions above $114.44 with Brent preferred over WTI for Strait exposure.

signals.name: Euro/US Dollar
signals.reason: Closed +0.23% on week at 1.1748; soft CPI data would revive rate-cut expectations and support EUR strength; weekly liquidity at 1.16774.
signals.source: NordFX Market Analysis & YouTube Forex Forecast

signals.name: British Pound/US Dollar
signals.reason: Included in weekly forecast analysis but specific levels and sentiment not detailed in available sources; awaiting CPI data for directional clarity.

signals.name: US Dollar Index
signals.reason: Hot CPI data would strengthen USD; soft data would weaken it; current bias neutral-to-bearish pending inflation print.

signals.name: S&P 500 Index
signals.reason: Long setup triggered above 7,230.12 produced +1.92% gain; analysts recommend continued long positions with CPI as key catalyst.

signals.name: NASDAQ 100 Index
signals.reason: Long setup above 27,685.40 produced +4.35% gain; tech outperformance continues with crypto and growth assets benefiting from rate-cut narrative.

signals.name: Apple
signals.reason: Mega-cap tech exposure to broader rate-cut and inflation narrative; no specific directional call in available sources.

signals.name: Nvidia
signals.reason: AI narrative and tech sector strength support upside; NASDAQ outperformance (+4.35%) suggests continued momentum in semiconductor leaders.

signals.name: Alphabet/Google
signals.reason: Mega-cap tech beneficiary of NASDAQ strength and AI narrative; no specific headwinds identified in available sources.

signals.name: Gasoline Futures (UGA ETF)
signals.reason: Gasoline 'leads' crude oil and held up better during recent selloff; analysts recommend long above $3.7382 with Hormuz tensions providing structural support.

signals.name: WTI Crude Oil
signals.reason: Brent preferred over WTI for Hormuz exposure; recent long setup above $112.50 turned bearish with -11.49% loss; awaiting geopolitical clarity.
